sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_last (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32));
SELECT arrayLastOrNull(x -> x > 2, values) FROM test_array_last WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayLastOrNull(x -> x > 0, values) FROM test_array_last WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayLastOrNull(x -> x = 3, values) FROM test_array_last WHERE id = 3;
